title: Reis AT Field
wikitext:
[]: Rei's AT-Field             Quote Post by r0ach » Fri Jan 06, 2012 12:58 am It seems she didn't really know she had one, or at least how to use it, until after her little run-in with Kaworu. She seemed to have a pretty good grasp of it when she blocked out his AT-field later in episode 24. Anyway, what was it exactly that made her AT-field start to fall apart in EoE? Gendo mentioned it wouldn't hold it's shape much longer, hence why her arm fell of? Third Impact with the MP Evas seemed to be getting under way above ground, but that doesn't seem like a good catalyst for Rei to start falling apart. any ideas?

[]:             Quote Post by Stikuru » Fri Jan 06, 2012 1:06 am Anyway, what was it exactly that made her AT-field start to fall apart in EoE? Gendo mentioned it wouldn't hold it's shape much longer, hence why her arm fell of? Third Impact with the MP Evas seemed to be getting under way above ground, but that doesn't seem like a good catalyst for Rei to start falling apart.

[]:             Quote Post by rhfxz1s » Sun Jan 08, 2012 5:00 am I was always under the impression that she began to purposely weaken her AT field in order to allow Gendo in. Presumably, she had reached a point where she couldn't go back and it would eventually collapse in time.

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Sun Jan 08, 2012 8:03 am rhfxz1s wrote: I was always under the impression that she began to purposely weaken her AT field in order to allow Gendo in. Presumably, she had reached a point where she couldn't go back and it would eventually collapse in time.

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Sun Jan 08, 2012 1:18 pm I proposed an idea of what's going on with Rei's arm here .

[]:             Quote Post by ReiAyanami25 » Sun Jan 08, 2012 8:26 pm My opinion on Rei's AT field is that Rei one and two were not aware of it, or they possibly could not put it to any use. The reason I see for this is that Rei three seemed to possess the whole soul of Lilith, unlike the Reis that came before her, so perhaps she could only deploy her AT feild when she had Lilith's entire soul, perhaps the angel part of her being and form was not prominent enough until she became Rei three. Maybe this encounter with Kaworu SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Stikuru » Sun Jan 08, 2012 9:37 pm perhaps because she did not even have one until Rei three appeared.

[]:             Quote Post by ReiAyanami25 » Sun Jan 08, 2012 11:00 pm Stikuru wrote: Or does the soul just exist in both at once?

[]:             Quote Post by GiftedPilot » Fri Oct 19, 2012 6:24 pm You could also think of this as Lillith escaping, and since Rei is now empty, Truly and Completely, she falls apart.
